name: diff_match_patch_diff_v1
description: Behavior contract for the v1 (diff) scope of diff-match-patch. The golden ops are intentionally EXACT: they pin the specific Python implementation (diff-match-patch 20241021), not merely 'a valid minimal diff'. Any Rust port must reproduce these exact operation sequences.

config.note: Diff_Timeout=0 removes the time-based bisect bail so diff_main is deterministic. Diff_EditCost=4 is fixed for the efficiency cleanup cases.

invariants.ops_only_minus1_0_1: Every diff operation code is one of -1, 0, 1.
invariants.reconstruct_text1: Concatenating the text of EQUAL and DELETE ops yields text1.
invariants.reconstruct_text2: Concatenating the text of EQUAL and INSERT ops yields text2.
invariants.merged_no_empty_ops: After diff_cleanupMerge, no operation has empty text (except a possible single leading empty EQUAL kept by the reference).
invariants.merged_no_adjacent_edits_of_same_type: After diff_cleanupMerge, adjacent INSERT or DELETE operations are merged. The reference may retain adjacent EQUAL operations after factoring an identical delete/insert pair.
